productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Lfc Auth Hood Grey Sweatshirts
description: CompositionGrey melange sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, hood with a woven tape drawstring, short zippered chest placket, insert pockets on the sides, appliqued brand name on the left sleeve, appliqued club seal on the right hem and ribbed hemlineFittingRegularWash careWash in water below 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on prints/trims/logoRoot for the Liverpool football Club everytime you wear this grey melange hooded sweat-shirt from adidas. The authentic club hoodie with the Liverpool FC seal near the right hem and on the left sleeve adds to the sporty vibe of the sweat-shirt, while the fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this sweatshirt with jeans or tracks, tees and performance shoes for a street-wise look on and off the field.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in sweatshirtsHeight-6.2', Shoulders-16"
